issues.title: Missing Form Request Class
issues.description: StoreReviewRequest is imported but does not exist
issues.impact: Request validation logic is missing; validation is not properly encapsulated
issues.solution: Create app/Http/Requests/StoreReviewRequest.php with proper validation rules

issues.title: Missing Authorization Policy for Reviews
issues.description: Policy authorization referenced but no policy class exists
issues.impact: Authorization may silently fail or throw runtime errors
issues.solution: Define policy class or gate in AuthServiceProvider

issues.title: Misplaced Controller File
issues.description: ViewServiceProvider.php is located in wrong directory with wrong namespace context
issues.impact: PSR-4 autoloading may fail; confuses MVC structure

issues.title: Duplicate Model File in Views Directory
issues.description: CartItem.php model class is located in views directory (duplicate/misplaced)
problem: This is a model file (namespace: App\Models\CartItem)
Located in views directory instead of app/Models/
issues.impact: MVC pattern violation; may cause autoloading conflicts; creates confusion
issues.solution: Delete the file from views directory; keep only app/Models/CartItem.php

issues.title: Route/View Name Mismatch
issues.description: View uses incorrect route name for product deletion
issues.impact: Form submission will fail with 'Route not found' error
issues.solution: Change route name in view from admin.products.delete to admin.products.destroy

issues.title: Empty Rule Files in Views Directory
issues.description: Empty validation rule files misplaced in views directory
problem: Validation rule classes should be in app/Rules/ directory
issues.impact: Cannot use these validation rules; MVC pattern violation
issues.solution: Create proper rule classes in app/Rules/ directory; Delete from views directory

issues.title: Missing Authorization Policy Class
issues.description: AuthServiceProvider has empty policies array; no policies defined
issues.issue: Authorization policies referenced in ReviewController are not registered
issues.impact: Authorization checks in ReviewController will fail silently

issues.title: Unused Model Relationship - CartItem Not Linked to User
issues.description: User model missing relationship to CartItem
problem: CartItem table has user_id foreign key (confirmed in migrations)
User model only has orders() relationship
issues.impact: Cannot access user's cart items via ORM relationship
issues.solution: Add relationship to User model: public function cartItems() { return $this->hasMany(CartItem::class); }

issues.title: Incomplete Method in AdminController
issues.description: store() method calls undefined storeProduct() method
issues.problem: Methods createProduct() and storeProduct() don't exist in AdminController
issues.impact: Will throw 'Call to undefined method' error if routes call these methods
issues.solution: Either remove these legacy methods or implement proper product management in AdminController

issues.title: Unused Model Relationship - ChatbotMessage Not Linked to User
issues.description: ChatbotMessage has optional user relationship but User model missing reverse relationship
problem: User model doesn't have chatbotMessages() relationship
issues.impact: Cannot access user's chat messages via: $user->chatbotMessages
issues.solution: Add relationship to User model: public function chatbotMessages() { return $this->hasMany(ChatbotMessage::class); }

issues.title: Missing Relationship - User to ChatbotResponse (created_by)
issues.description: User model missing relationship to responses created by admin
problem: ChatbotResponse has created_by foreign key pointing to User
User model has no reverse relationship
issues.impact: Cannot easily get all ChatbotResponses created by a user
issues.solution: Add relationship to User model: public function chatbotResponses() { return $this->hasMany(ChatbotResponse::class, 'created_by'); }

issues.title: Incomplete Switch Statement Logic
issues.description: Switch statement in ProductController has potential logic issue
issues.note: Switch statement is complete but could be optimized. Already handled correctly with break statements and default case

issues.title: Method Parameter Verification
issues.description: Verify some routes have matching controller methods

issues.title: Missing Views Folder for Admin Sections
issues.description: Routes reference views that may not exist
issues.status: NOT VERIFIED - Requires view file check
issues.note: Many blade.php files exist but comprehensive inventory was not completed

recommendations: Move rule files to app/Rules/ directory
Add missing model relationships to User model
